content:
Jupiter in Virgo: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Jupiter in Virgo blends the archetypal drive of Jupiter (where you grow, seek meaning, and find opportunity) with the Earth, mutable nature of Virgo.

  • Planet: Jupiter — growth, expansion, belief, opportunity, wisdom
  • Sign: Virgo (Earth/Mutable) — analysis, service, precision, health, craft

Eastern Perspective

Parallel Eastern reference (not historical correspondence): 七曜 (Seven Luminaries: Sun/Moon + Mars=火/水/木/金/土 五星 mapped to 火曜/水曜/木曜/金曜/土曜). Use as parallel frame only, not as Western-Eastern historical equivalence.
